title: polystichum submarginale
intro: Polystichum submarginale, also known as the Chinese Lady fern, is a species of fern native to Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polystichum submarginale include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and improving respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
